name: GWISIN

abilities.name: Take the Hit
abilities.text: Once per activation. After another friendly model within 2" is dealt damage, this model may be dealt the same amount of damage to reduce the amount dealt to the other model to 0.

triggers.name: Spirit Rend
triggers.text: The target must have an Adversary token. When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target. This model may draw a card and then discard a card.

triggers.name: Draw Out Pain
triggers.text: Remove a Spiritual Chains token from the target. Deal 2 damage to the target and draw a card.

actions.name: Drawn by Hate
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action does not require LoS. Remove an Adversary token from the target. Place this model into base contact with the target and declare a (melee) action.

triggers.name: Erase Their Legacy
triggers.text: Remove all enemy Scheme markers within (t)2" of the target.

extraction_notes: Model limit is 3, extracted from 'Minion (3)' characteristic
STN: 9 appears below the character artwork
